name: [GRIDHAND] Lead Capture Agent - Facebook Lead Ad → HubSpot contact → Twilio SMS welcome

gridhand.scenario: Facebook Lead Ad → HubSpot contact → Twilio SMS welcome
gridhand.description: When a customer fills out a Facebook Lead Ad for a free consultation at a local gym, the lead information is automatically synced to HubSpot as a new contact, triggering a workflow that sends a personalized Twilio SMS welcome message within minutes, thanking them for their interest and inviting them to schedule an appointment, allowing the gym owner to quickly follow up and convert the lead into a paying member. This automated process saves the gym owner time and increases the likelihood of converting leads, as it ensures a prompt and engaging response to potential customers. By streamlining the lead response process, the gym owner can focus on providing excellent service and growing their business, rather than manually sending welcome messages to new leads.
